description: Letter from Abū ʿAlī to his father Abū l-ʿIzz al-Sharābī, in Fustat, in Sūq al-Kabīr. In Judaeo-Arabic. He reports that his mother and Yūsuf arrived safely after four days of travel by boat. He has sent his father a fulled maqṭaʿ cloth worth 49 dirhams and wishes to have for its price 150 jars with unnamed contents. If that sum were not sufficient, he would deliver the balance to the carrier. He alludes to his illness in passing by way of explaining why he has not done something (line 21). See also T-S 12.817 (PGPID 7350). (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, IV, p. 446.) ASE
tags: Arabic address, illness: mention, illness letter 969-1517, Illness
description_he: מכתב מאבו עלי לאביו אבו אל-עז אל-שראבי בפוסטאט. מדווח על הגעת אמו ויוסף בשלום לאחר ארבעה ימים בספינה. שלח בד מגולגל ב-49 דרהם ומבקש 150 כדים בתמורה.
